## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss sales process optimization and onboarding for Bruno Santilli at Growth X.](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X is experiencing a surge in leads, with 35+ meetings booked on Marcel's calendar](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Bruno is being onboarded to help manage and qualify these leads](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [A new sales process is being developed, including lead qualification criteria and tiered categorization](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [One Password will be used for shared logins and password management across the team](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

## Topics

### Lead Influx and Calendar Management

  - [35+ meetings booked on Marcel's calendar](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Bruno given access to Marcel's calendar to manage and reschedule meetings](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Plan to potentially route meetings to Bruno, Jimmy, or Marcel based on qualification criteria](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Sales Process Development

  - [Creating a new "Sales Process" or "Sales Playbook" page in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Developing qualification criteria based on product-market fit concept](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Categorizing leads into three tiers based on domain authority scores:](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
      - [Tier 1: 0-15](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Tier 2: 15-30](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Tier 3: 30-50](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1335.0)

### Lead Qualification Criteria

  - [Assessing website legitimacy and traffic using SEMrush](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Evaluating company email vs. personal email usage](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Considering factors like:](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [Organic vs. paid growth strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [Current growth methods](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [Growth goals](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
      - [Budget availability](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [Timeline for solving problems](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Identifying red flags:](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Unrealistic expectations](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [New sites with no established data/authority](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
      - [Lack of dedicated marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [Overly busy founders/CEOs](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Tools and Access

  - [One Password implementation for shared logins](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Bruno given access to Marcel's calendar](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [SEMrush access for website analysis](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Slack and Notion usage, with tips on efficient searching (Command+K)](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Meeting Handling Process

  - [Bruno to review and accept Calendly invites](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Categorize leads into tiers](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Draft email responses for different lead qualities](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Reschedule meetings strategically:](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Group lower-quality leads on one day](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Schedule higher-quality leads on another day](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [High-quality leads to be handled by Marcel, with Bruno joining](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to draft email templates for Bruno to use in responses](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Coordinate with EAs to reschedule meetings strategically](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Bruno to join high-quality lead meetings with Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Continue refining the sales process and qualification criteria](https://fathom.video/share/zQLyzCPzRtAgBf94cXRWahGnedpCLcdR?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
